keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY STOMACH AND ABDOMEN. Stomach and abdomen : Aeth., Arg-n., Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Coloc., Ip., Lach., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, behind stomach : Arn., Cact., Ham., Kali-c., Stram. Stomach and abdomen, upper abdomen : Caust., Cham., Chin., Cocc., Nux-v., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, navel (about) : Bry., Coloc., Dios., Ip., Kre., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Rhus-t., Ver-a., Verb. Stomach and abdomen, navel, suppurating : Pho. Stomach and abdomen, ileo-ccal region : Ars., Bapt., Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Chin., Coloc., Lach., Lyc., Merc-c., Mur-ac., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pho., Plb., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul., Thu. Stomach and abdomen, sides : Asaf., Carb-v., Chin., Ign. Stomach and abdomen, sides, right : Ars., Lach., Lyc., Rhus-t. Stomach and abdomen, sides, right to left : Sep. Stomach and abdomen, sides, left : Alu., Arg-m., Asaf., Brom., Dulc., Flu-ac., Hep., Plb., Rhe., Sil., Sul., Tarx. Stomach and abdomen, sides, left, to right : Nux-v. Stomach and abdomen, sides, alternating : Arn., Pul., Sul. Stomach and abdomen, loins (flanks) : Canth., Rhe., Thu., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, lower : Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Lyc., Merc., Ran-b., Sep., Squil. Stomach and abdomen, lower, backward, right : Caust., Pho., Sep., Ust. Stomach and abdomen, lower, backward, left : Aco., Carb-v. Stomach and abdomen, upward , right : Aco., Kali-c., Mag-m., Murx., Seneg., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, upward, left : Alu., Ign., Naj., Nat-s., Spo., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, upward, diagonally : Lach. Stomach and abdomen, anxiety , emotions felt in, etc. : Ars., Aur., Carb-v., Cham., Cup., Kali-c., Nux-v., Pho., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, backward , pain goes : Arn., Ars., Bell., Bor., Carb-v., Chel., Con., Cup., Fer., Kali-p., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho., Plb., Pul., Sep., Sul., Tab. Stomach and abdomen, boring in : Plb., Stan. Stomach and abdomen, burning in : Ars., Canth., Carb-v., Cic., Merc-c., Pho., Ran-b., Sec-c., Sep., Sul., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, burning in, navel : Aco., Bov., Kali-io., Lach., Lyc., Phyt., Plb., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, cancer : Lyc., Pho. Stomach and abdomen, changing , about in : Dios., Nux-v. Stomach and abdomen, coldness : Amb., Ars., Calc-c., Colch., Kali-c., Men., Pho., Sec-c., Sul-ac., Ver-a., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, coughing , agg. : Bry., Dros., Nux-v. Stomach and abdomen, cramp : Bell., Cham., Coloc. , Cup., Dios., Ign., Mag-m., Nux-v., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, cutting : Bell., Bry., Chin., Coloc., Ip., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul., Rhe., Sul., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, diarrha , sense of : Dulc., Nux-v., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, digestion disordered : Ant-c., Arg-n., Ip., Nat-c., Nux-v., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, distended , tympanitic, inflated, swelled, etc. : Aco., Arg-n., Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Colch., Grap., Kali-c., Lyc., Merc., Nat-c., Nat-m., Nux-m., Nux-v., Pho., Rhus-t., Stram., Sul., Terb., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, distended, tympanitic, inflated, swelled, etc., side : Nat-m. Stomach and abdomen, drawing : Pul. Stomach and abdomen, drinking (water), agg. : Ars., Pho., Zing. Stomach and abdomen, drinking (bad water), agg. : Zing. Stomach and abdomen, eating , amel. : Anac., Ign., Lach., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, eating too much, agg. : Ant-c., Cof., Ip., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, empty , hollow, weak, sinking, etc. : Carb-an., Dig., Hyds., Ign., Ip., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Sep., Stan., Stap., Sul., Tab., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, empty, hollow, weak, sinking, etc., not amel. by eating : Cina., Lach., Lyc., Mur-ac., Pho., Sep., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, fats , agg. : Carb-v., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, fermentation in : Chin. Stomach and abdomen, food spoiled, agg. : Ars. Stomach and abdomen, forward into : Thu. Stomach and abdomen, fulness : Carb-v., Chin., Kali-c., Lyc., Nux-v., Sul. Stomach and abdomen, gnawing , eating, ulcerative pain : Carb-v., Pho., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, gurgling in : Alo., Crot-t., Gamb., Pod., Sul. Stomach and abdomen, gurgling in, then gushing stools : Alo., Crot-t., Gamb., Iris., Jat., Nat-s., Pho., Pod., Sec-c., Sul., Thu., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, hard : Grap., Merc., Sil. Stomach and abdomen, heavy : Alo., Am-m., Grap., Kali-c., Nux-v., Pul., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, holds the : Ag-c., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, ileus : Nux-v., Op., Plb., Rhus-t., Thu. Stomach and abdomen, inflamed : Aco., Ant-t., Ars., Bry., Ip., Nux-v., Pho., Pul. Stomach and abdomen, lump , ball, stone, etc. : Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sul. Stomach and abdomen, pain , dull, aching, indefinite, etc. : Ars., Coloc., Cup., Nux-v., Plb., Pul., Sep., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, pressure , load, etc. : Agar., Arn., Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Cham., Chin., Hyo., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul. Stomach and abdomen, pressure, load, etc., lower : Pho-ac. Stomach and abdomen, pressure, agg. : Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Chin., Merc-c. Stomach and abdomen, pressure, amel. : Arg-n., Castr., Coloc., Stan. Stomach and abdomen, rawness : Ars., Bell., Canth., Nux-v., Ran-b. Stomach and abdomen, rubbing , amel. : Pod. Stomach and abdomen, sore spot in : Arg-n., Bar-c., Bism., Kali-bi. Stomach and abdomen, spasmodic pain : Caust. Stomach and abdomen, stool , amel. : Colch., Coloc., Gamb., Mag-c., Nux-v., Ver-a. Stomach and abdomen, sunken : Ap., Calc-p., Cup., Hyds., Plb., Ver-a., Zin. Stomach and abdomen, tearing , shooting : Cham. Stomach and abdomen, tension : Arn., Caps., Carb-v., Chin., Coloc., Sil. Stomach and abdomen, throbbing : Nux-v., Pul., Sele., Sep. Stomach and abdomen, ulcer and ulcerative feeling : Kali-bi., Pho., Ran-b. Stomach and abdomen, upward , extending : Aco., Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Lact-ac., Saba. Stomach and abdomen, warm (foods), amel. : Lyc., Mag-p., Nux-v., Sul-ac. Stomach and abdomen, weak , sinking, hanging, etc. : Ign., Pho. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
